bs_description: Comma-separated channel IDs where the bot answers (regex rules).
JSON array: [{"pattern":"(?i)pricing","response":"See https://example.com/pricing"}] — first match wins.
If non-empty, only messages starting with this prefix trigger replies (after trimming).

bs_default: I do not have a canned answer. A teammate will follow up, or ask in a thread with details.
bs_description: Sent when no regex matches (only if message was a FAQ trigger).
If true, post an inbox task when there is no regex match (for human + vector follow-up in Flexus).
Minimum seconds between bot replies per user in a channel.
When escalating to kanban, prepend this many prior user messages from the channel as context (0 disables).
If true, log FAQ triggers to logger only (no channel reply, no kanban escalation).
